learningObjectives: Name four basic colours and common clothes items at Starters level.
Use adjective + noun order to describe clothes: a red shirt.
Use verb be to describe colour: The dress is blue.
Match colours to objects in pictures and short texts.
Follow listen-and-colour instructions with colour and clothes words.
grammarFocus: Adjective + noun order: a red shirt

grammarReference.structure: Adjective + noun order: a red shirt
grammarReference.explanation: In English, the colour adjective comes before the noun: a red shirt, not a shirt red.
commonMistakes: a shirt red (×) → a red shirt (✓)
dress blue a (×) → a blue dress (✓)

grammarReference.explanation: Use is or are with a colour adjective to describe what something looks like.
commonMistakes: The shirt red is (×) → The shirt is red. (✓)
The shoes is blue (×) → The shoes are blue. (✓)

grammarReference.explanation: Use What colour is…? to ask about the colour of one thing.
commonMistakes: What is colour your shirt? (×) → What colour is your shirt? (✓)

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Colours and Clothes
lessons.learningObjective: Recognise and understand twelve colour and clothes words at Starters level.

exercises.title: Learn: Colour and Clothes Match
exercises.instructions: Read each sentence. Choose the best word.

questions.questionText: The sky and the sea are often _____.
questions.explanation: Blue is the colour of the sky and sea. Red and yellow are warm colours.

choices.distractorNote: Warm colour; not typical for sky

questions.questionText: You wear these on your feet.
questions.explanation: Shoes go on your feet. A shirt goes on your body; a hat goes on your head.
Green is the colour of grass and leaves. Blue is for sky; red is for apples.

questions.questionText: Girls often wear a _____ to a party.
questions.explanation: A dress is a piece of clothing often worn by girls. Trousers cover the legs; a jacket is outerwear.

choices.distractorNote: Leg wear, not a party dress
Outer layer, not a full outfit

exercises.title: Practice: Match the Pairs
exercises.instructions: Match each word on the left with the correct meaning on the right.

questions.questionText: Match the colour and clothes words to their meanings.
questions.explanation: Each word matches one clear meaning. Red and pink are both warm colours but different shades.

pairs.right: what you wear on your feet

exercises.title: Check: Colours and Clothes Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.explanation: Green là màu của cỏ và lá.

choices.distractorNote: Pink — màu hồng, không phải cây

questions.questionText: You wear these on your feet.
questions.explanation: Shoes đi trên chân.

questions.questionText: Complete with colour or clothes words.
questions.explanation: red/blue cho màu; shirt/dress cho quần áo.

content.template: My [0] shirt is nice. Her [1] is pink.

exercises.title: Review: Colours and Clothes Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.explanation: Green là màu của cỏ và lá.

choices.distractorNote: Pink — màu hồng, không phải cây

questions.questionText: You wear these on your feet.
questions.explanation: Shoes đi trên chân.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Basic Colours
lessons.learningObjective: Recognise and use red, blue, green, yellow and pink in context.

questions.questionText: The sun looks _____ in the sky.
questions.explanation: Yellow là màu của mặt trời.
Blue thường là màu biển/trời.
Red thường là màu táo.

choices.distractorNote: Green — ít dùng cho táo ở Starters

questions.questionText: Match each colour to its example.
questions.explanation: Ghép màu với hình ảnh quen thuộc.

questions.questionText: Which colour is NOT in Anna's outfit in the story?
questions.explanation: Anna wears yellow shoes and a pink hat — không có black.
Yellow phù hợp với chuối.
Điền màu phù hợp ngữ cảnh.

content.template: The sky is [0]. The grass is [1].

questions.questionText: Which colour is NOT in Anna's outfit in the story?
questions.explanation: Anna wears yellow shoes and a pink hat — không có black.
Yellow phù hợp với chuối.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Clothes Words
lessons.learningObjective: Name common clothes items and match them to body parts.

questions.questionText: You wear this on your upper body.
questions.explanation: Shirt mặc trên thân.

questions.questionText: Girls often wear a _____ to a party.
questions.explanation: Dress là váy/đầm.

questions.questionText: When it is cold, you put on a _____.
questions.explanation: Jacket giữ ấm khi trời lạnh.
Ghép đồ mặc với vị trí trên cơ thể.

questions.questionText: Tom's father buys _____ at the shop.
questions.explanation: His father buys black trousers.
Colour = màu sắc.
I wear + màu + đồ.

questions.questionText: Tom's father buys _____ at the shop.
questions.explanation: His father buys black trousers.
Colour = màu sắc.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Describing Clothes
lessons.learningObjective: Use adjective + noun order and verb be to describe colours and clothes.

exercises.title: Learn: Choose the Correct Phrase
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct word or phrase to complete each sentence.

questions.explanation: In English, the adjective comes before the noun: a blue dress.

choices.distractorNote: Adjective after noun — Vietnamese word order

questions.explanation: Shoes is plural, so use are. The colour adjective comes after the verb be.
Jacket is singular, so use is.
What colour is…? is the correct question form for asking about colour.

exercises.title: Practice: Describe the Clothes
exercises.instructions: Complete the sentences with the correct words.

questions.questionText: Complete: I have [0] red [1]. | The [2] are blue.
questions.explanation: Adjective before noun (a red shirt); shoes is plural so use are with blue.

content.template: I have [0] red [1]. The [2] are blue.

questions.explanation: Màu đứng trước danh từ: a blue dress.
Shoes số nhiều → are.
What colour is…? và is/are + màu.

content.template: [0] colour is your hat? It [1] yellow.

questions.explanation: Màu đứng trước danh từ: a blue dress.
Shoes số nhiều → are.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Adjective + Noun
lessons.learningObjective: Use colour adjectives before nouns: a red shirt, green shoes.

questions.explanation: Màu đứng trước danh từ.
A pink hat — màu trước noun.
Điền màu trước danh từ.
A red dress — chuẩn Starters.
A white shirt — màu trước shirt.
a + màu + danh từ.
A red dress — chuẩn Starters.
A white shirt — màu trước shirt.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Is/Are and What Colour
lessons.learningObjective: Describe colours with is/are and ask What colour is…?

questions.explanation: Dress số ít → is.
Shoes số nhiều → are.
Chọn is/are theo chủ ngữ.

content.template: Her hat [0] pink. Their shoes [1] yellow.

questions.explanation: What colour is…? — hỏi màu.
Shoes → are black.

questions.questionText: You want to know about a jacket's colour. Ask:
questions.explanation: What colour is your jacket? — đúng.
What colour is…? — hỏi màu.
Shoes → are black.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Match Colours and Objects
lessons.learningObjective: Read a short text about clothes and colours and answer questions about main idea, details and vocabulary.

exercises.title: Learn: Read: Getting Dressed
exercises.instructions: Read the text. Then answer the questions.

passage.title: Getting Dressed
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Linh. Today is cold.

I put on my green jacket. Under it, I wear a red shirt. My trousers are blue. On my feet, I have yellow shoes.

My friend Anna is here. Her dress is pink. Her hat is yellow too!

We go to school. What colour are your clothes today?
passage.imagePrompt: Two children getting dressed: one in a green jacket, red shirt, blue trousers and yellow shoes; another in a pink dress and yellow hat.

questions.questionText: What is the main idea of the text?
questions.explanation: The text describes what Linh and Anna wear and the colours of their clothes.

choices.text: Linh describes her clothes and colours.
Linh talks about her favourite food.

questions.explanation: The text says: My trousers are blue.

questions.questionText: Why does Linh wear a jacket?
questions.explanation: The text says Today is cold, so Linh puts on a jacket for warmth.

questions.questionText: In 'Her dress is pink', who does her refer to?
questions.explanation: Her refers to Anna, Linh's friend mentioned in the previous sentence.

choices.distractorNote: Linh would use my, not her

questions.questionText: Put the ideas in order: (1) Linh says it is cold (2) Linh describes Anna (3) Linh describes her own clothes
questions.explanation: The text moves from weather → Linh's clothes → Anna's clothes.

passage.title: Anna Gets Dressed
passage.text:
Anna wakes up. She opens her cupboard.

She has a red shirt and blue trousers. She puts on a green dress.

Her shoes are yellow. Her hat is pink.

"What colour is your dress?" asks her mother. "It is green!" says Anna.
passage.imagePrompt: Girl choosing clothes: red shirt, blue trousers, green dress, yellow shoes.

questions.explanation: She puts on a green dress.
Her shoes are yellow.

passage.title: Anna Gets Dressed

questions.explanation: Her hat is pink.

questions.questionText: Who asks about the dress colour?
questions.explanation: What colour is your dress? asks her mother.

questions.questionText: Anna keeps a red shirt and blue trousers in her _____.
questions.explanation: She opens her cupboard.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: The Clothes Shop
lessons.learningObjective: Understand colours and shopping details in a shop text.

passage.title: The Clothes Shop
passage.text:
Tom and his father go to a shop. Tom sees a blue jacket and a red hat.

"I like the yellow shirt," says Tom. The shoes are green.

His father buys black trousers. Tom is happy with his new clothes.
passage.imagePrompt: Clothes shop with colourful shirts, dresses, shoes and hats on display.

questions.questionText: Who goes to the shop with Tom?
questions.explanation: Tom and his father go to a shop.
I like the yellow shirt, says Tom.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: School Uniform Day
lessons.learningObjective: Read about school clothes and colours in a uniform text.

passage.title: School Uniform Day
passage.text:
Today is special at school. All children wear smart clothes.

Mai has a white shirt and a blue skirt. Nam wears grey trousers.

Their shoes are black. "You look nice!" says the teacher.

What colour is your shirt? Mine is blue!
passage.imagePrompt: Children in school uniforms with different coloured shirts and shoes.

questions.questionText: What is special at school today?
questions.explanation: Today is special at school. All children wear smart clothes.
Mai has a white shirt and a blue skirt.

choices.text: A white shirt and blue skirt

What colour is your shirt? Mine is blue!
passage.imagePrompt: Children in school uniforms with different coloured shirts and shoes.

questions.explanation: Nam wears grey trousers.

questions.questionText: What colour are the children's shoes?
questions.explanation: Their shoes are black.

lessons.title: Lesson 4: Listen and Colour
lessons.learningObjective: Listen to colour and clothes instructions and identify the correct items.

exercises.title: Learn: Listen: Colour the Picture
exercises.instructions: Listen to the instructions. Choose the correct answer.

script.title: Colour the Clothes

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: Look at the picture, Ben. Colour the shirt red.

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: Good. Now colour the trousers blue.

script.audioNotes: Clear, slow delivery with pauses after each instruction. Total duration approx. 30 seconds.

questions.explanation: The teacher says: Colour the shirt red.
The teacher says: Colour the trousers blue.
The last instruction is to colour the shoes green.

questions.questionText: What does Lily put on first?
questions.explanation: Put on your red shirt.
Your shoes are green.
Your dress is yellow.
Mother nói: Put on your red shirt.
Ghép đồ và màu từ hội thoại.
Your dress is yellow.
Mother nói: Put on your red shirt.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Listen and Colour
lessons.learningObjective: Follow listen-and-colour instructions with clothes words.

script.title: Listen and Colour
script.audioNotes: Slow clear commands for colouring task. Approx. 20 seconds.

questions.explanation: Colour the hat red.

questions.questionText: What does the teacher colour second?
questions.explanation: Colour the shirt blue — sau mũ.

script.title: Listen and Colour

questions.explanation: Colour the dress green.

questions.explanation: Colour the shoes yellow.
